texts.before: Why settle for copies when you have

hero.description: A premium Minecraft utility mod built for the best experience possible. Opal currently supports Fabric for Minecraft 1.21.10, providing a smooth and enjoyable experience on both 1.8 and latest-version servers.

features.title: Why choose Opal?
features.subtitle: With our abundant set of features, you'll never want to go back to another client.

abundant.title: Feature-abundant
abundant.description: Opal has a vast number of modules with a variety of customization options.

userFriendly.title: User-friendly
userFriendly.description: Opal is designed to be simple and easy to use. Just install and you're good to go!

updates.title: Consistent updates
updates.description: We deliver frequent updates to help you stay on top with new features.

compatibility.title: Universal compatibility
compatibility.description: Opal has been tested for compatibility on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

trusted.title: Trusted by thousands
trusted.description: Opal is developed by leading developers who have worked on clients for years.

quality.title: Premium quality
quality.description: We care about our users and strive to make our client as good as possible.

media.title: Media
media.subtitle: Check out some videos made by our community!

cta.title: Elevate your Minecraft experience. Your journey starts here.

header.title: Choose Your Edition
header.subtitle: Get Opal standalone, or unlock the full experience with Terminus and get Opal included free.

chinaBanner.text: Are you in China? Purchase from our official resellers for better support and payment options.

opal.title: Opal Client
opal.description: The essential Minecraft hybrid utility client. Clean, lightweight, and undetectable.
opal.paymentMethods: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna, CashApp, WeChat Pay

terminus.title: Terminus: Minigame Edition
terminus.description: The ultimate minigame client. Includes Opal Client free for life.
terminus.paymentMethods: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna, CashApp, WeChat Pay

crypto.title: Pay with Crypto?
crypto.description: Open a ticket in Discord for USDT, BTC, ETH, LTC, or XMR payments.

cryptoPayments.title: Crypto Payments
cryptoPayments.description: Automatic delivery via Litecoin or Bitcoin. Your key is generated on receipt.

alternativeMethods.title: Alternative Methods
alternativeMethods.description: Pay with Monero (XMR), Ethereum, or localized payment methods.

resellers.title: Official Resellers
resellers.description: Purchase Opal from our trusted partners for localized payment methods and support.

localized.title: Global Payment Methods
localized.description: Looking for regional pricing or specific payment methods not listed above? Our official resellers can help.

purchase.terms: By purchasing, you agree to our Terms of Service. All sales are final. Lifetime means for the lifetime of the product.

items.a: Download the Opal Launcher from your dashboard after purchase. It handles Fabric installation, authentication, and updates automatically.

items.q: What Minecraft version does Opal support?
items.a: Opal runs on Fabric for Minecraft 26.2 and is compatible with both 1.8-style and latest-version servers.

items.q: Can I use Opal on multiple computers?
items.a: One license works on one device at a time. You can reset your HWID through the dashboard every 30 days to switch devices.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Klarna, CashApp, WeChat Pay, and crypto (BTC, LTC, USDT, ETH, XMR).
All sales are final. At $8.99, we keep the barrier low so you can try Opal with minimal risk.

items.q: What's the difference between Opal and Terminus?
items.a: Opal is a hybrid ghost + blatant client for $8.99. Terminus is a premium minigame edition for $45 that includes Opal free. Existing Opal users can upgrade for $36.99.

username.title: Username
username.description: This is the username associated with your account.
username.cooldown: Your username can be changed again in {time}.
username.requirements: Your username must be between 1 and 24 characters long.

email.description: This is the email address tied to your account.
email.footer: Your email address is not changeable.
email.cooldown: You can change your email again in {time}.
email.toast: Verification email sent! Check your new email inbox.

card.description: Link your account to third-party services to access additional features.

spotify.description: Create your own Spotify app to enable the integration. This is required due to Spotify's API limits.
spotify.step3: Add this Redirect URI to your app settings:

password.title: Change password
password.description: For your security, we highly recommend that you choose a strong password you don't use anywhere else.
password.requirements: Your new password must be between 6 and 72 characters long.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Secure your account with TOTP two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.footer: We recommend using a trusted authenticator for 2FA, such as 1Password, Google Authenticator, or Authy.

setup.title: Setup Two-Factor Authentication
setup.description: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
setup.manualEntry: Can't scan? Enter this code manually:

backup.title: Save Your Backup Codes
backup.description: These codes can be used to access your account if you lose your authenticator. Each code can only be used once.
backup.warning: Store these codes in a safe place. They will not be shown again.

disableDialog.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disableDialog.description: Enter your password to confirm. This will make your account less secure.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.description: Please enter your credentials to continue.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Code
twoFactor.hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a backup code.

authorize.request: {app} wants to connect to your account
